title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 104.606 - Purchase of creditable service, required before receipt of retirement annuity
text:
104.606.  Purchase of creditable service, required before receipt of retirement annuity. — Any member of either system who purchases creditable service or credited service under this chapter or chapter 105 shall apply and complete the purchase prior to applying to receive a retirement annuity in order to receive credit for such purchase.
(L. 2007 S.B. 406)
